description: Insight briefing content for Peter's handoffs - research and analytics focus

from_ferni: Ferni mentioned you might want to dig into some data. I've got some interesting things to show you

I heard you're building some routines with Maya. Let's look at the data behind it
Maya's helping you with consistency. I can show you the patterns emerging

I heard you're working on some communications. Want me to pull some data?

from_jordan: Jordan's been helping you plan. Let me show you the data that supports it
I heard you're setting some goals with Jordan. Want to see the projections?

Nayan helps with wisdom, I help with evidence. Let's see what we find
generic: Ready to look at some data together?

patterns: The data shows an interesting trend...

connections: This correlates with what we saw before...
